title: Audio & Feedback Micro-Polish
summary: Ten effort-1 audio and feedback additions that fill gaps in the soundscape and add subtle feedback touches. Undo/redo audio, pin hover sounds, gate counter color feedback, mute/unmute transitions, tooltip animations, keyboard shortcut audio, toolbox hover sounds, pre-level difficulty badges, mobile toolbox scroll indicator, and canvas cursor states.

tasks.description: Undo/Redo Audio Feedback — Add distinct sounds: undo = backward swoosh (descending frequency noise burst), redo = forward swoosh (ascending frequency noise burst). Call from performUndo() and performRedo() in main.js.
acceptance_criteria: Undo plays a descending swoosh sound
Redo plays an ascending swoosh sound
Sounds respect mute state
Micro-randomization applied

tasks.description: Pin Hover Audio Feedback — Play a quiet blip when hovering over a connectable pin. Throttle to max once per 100ms to avoid spam. Trigger from the mousemove handler where hoveredPin changes.
acceptance_criteria: Hovering over a pin plays a quiet blip
Sound is throttled (no rapid-fire on quick mouse movement)
Sound is different from the gate placement sound
Respects mute state

tasks.description: Gate Counter Live Feedback — Gate counter changes color at star thresholds: green when under 3★ budget, yellow at 2★, red at 1★. Add pulse animation class on threshold crossing.
acceptance_criteria: Gate counter text/border turns green when count <= optimal
Turns yellow when count <= good but > optimal
Turns red when count > good
A brief pulse animation plays when crossing a threshold

tasks.description: Mute/Unmute Transition Sound — Toggling sound plays a power-on sweep (unmute) or power-off descending tone (mute). The mute sound plays just before muting; the unmute sound plays right after unmuting.
acceptance_criteria: Unmuting plays an ascending power-on sweep
Muting plays a descending power-off tone (last sound before silence)
Sounds are short and non-intrusive

tasks.description: Tooltip Animation Enhancement — Onboarding tooltips get a pulsing arrow/bounce animation to draw attention. CSS animation on the tooltip container.
acceptance_criteria: Onboarding tooltip has a gentle pulsing/bounce animation
Animation is not aggressive — subtle and attention-drawing
Respects prefers-reduced-motion

tasks.description: Keyboard Shortcut Audio Feedback — Delete and Escape keys produce distinct audio feedback. Delete = short sharp click, Escape = soft cancel whoosh.
acceptance_criteria: Pressing Delete/Backspace to remove a gate/wire plays a short sharp sound
Pressing Escape to cancel wire drawing plays a soft cancel sound
Sounds respect mute state

tasks.description: Hover Sound for Toolbox Gates — Each gate type in the toolbox plays its unique frequency blip on hover. Throttle to avoid spam. Use gate-type-specific tones derived from gate placement sounds but quieter and shorter.
acceptance_criteria: Hovering over AND gate tool plays a sine blip
Hovering over OR gate tool plays a sawtooth blip
Hovering over NOT gate tool plays a square blip
Hovering over XOR gate tool plays an FM bell blip
Sounds are quieter than placement sounds
Throttled to prevent spam

tasks.description: Pre-Level Complexity Rating Badge — Already partially done (difficulty labels exist). Enhance with visual emoji badges: 🟢 Easy, 🟡 Medium, 🔴 Hard displayed prominently on level cards and in the level info panel during gameplay.
acceptance_criteria: Level cards show colored emoji difficulty badge
Gameplay info panel shows the difficulty badge next to the level title
Easy/Medium/Hard thresholds based on optimalGates

tasks.description: Mobile Toolbox Scroll Indicator — When toolbox overflows, add fade gradient at bottom to indicate more content. CSS-only solution using pseudo-element gradient overlay.
acceptance_criteria: When toolbox has overflow content, a fade gradient appears at the bottom
Gradient is subtle and doesn't block interaction
Only visible when there's actual overflow

tasks.description: Canvas Cursor States — Change cursor based on interaction context: crosshair in wire-drawing mode, grab when hovering a draggable gate, grabbing during drag, pointer on pins/wires. Already partially implemented in mousemove. Enhance to include wire-drawing mode and dragging state.
acceptance_criteria: Default canvas cursor is crosshair
Cursor changes to pointer when hovering pins or wires
Cursor changes to grab when hovering a gate
Cursor changes to grabbing during gate drag
During wire drawing, cursor is crosshair

testing_focus: Audio feedback plays correctly for all new sounds
No audio spam from rapid hover events
Gate counter colors change at correct thresholds
Cursor states are correct in all interaction modes
Mobile toolbox scroll indicator appears correctly
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
